# Subdomains

<!-- Classify subdomains for investment decisions. Maintain via domain-work-subdomain-classification. -->

| Subdomain | Type | Rationale | Primary context | Notes |
|-----------|------|-----------|-----------------|-------|
| — | core \| supporting \| generic | — | — | — |

**Type guide**

- **Core:** competitive advantage; invest in rich domain model and expert collaboration
- **Supporting:** necessary but not differentiating; good enough quality, avoid over-engineering
- **Generic:** commodity; buy/build generic solution; minimal custom model
